title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 509.350 - Motion searches record
text:
509.350.  Motion searches record. — Upon motion directed to an answer or reply, substantial defects in all prior pleadings may be considered and judgment rendered against the party who has first failed to state a claim upon which relief can be granted or to state a legal defense to a claim.
(L. 1943 p. 353 § 67)
